news.title: Greg Brockman Defends $30B OpenAI Stake: ‘Blood, Sweat, and Tears’

news.title: Someone Built an Open-Source 'Theoretical Mythos' to Reverse-Engineer Anthropic's Most Dangerous AI
news.summary: OpenMythos is a from-scratch attempt to reconstruct the architecture behind Claude Mythos, the cyber-capable model Anthropic refuses to release. It's speculation in code form.

news.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
news.summary: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

news.title: K-Pop Firm's Stock Plunges as It Dumps Bitcoin Treasury Plan for AI Pivot
news.summary: K Wave Media is shifting $485 million in funding from its Bitcoin treasury strategy towards an AI infrastructure play.

news.title: OpenAI and PwC collaborate to reimagine the office of the CFO

news.title: Haun Ventures Raises $1 Billion Fund for the Intersection of Crypto and AI Agents
news.summary: Katie Haun’s venture firm closes a $1 billion fund to target crypto infrastructure and systems for AI agents to transact autonomously.

news.title: DeepClaude Lets You Run Claude Code With DeepSeek's Brain for 17x Cheaper

news.title: This e-reader lets you view in color, and it's $60 cheaper now

news.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades

news.title: US Government Says China's Best AI Models Lag Behind. Experts Aren't So Sure
news.summary: NIST's CAISI evaluated DeepSeek V4 Pro using private benchmarks and a cost-comparison filter that excluded every Decrypt AI model except GPT-5.4 mini. Critics call the methodology convenient.
